notes: v0.16.50 — TOP PROFILE BAR rebuilt as the SEGMENTED HOLO mockup (variant 3): single seamless neon strip with vertical neon separators, cyan top edge, magenta bottom edge, scanlines. Sections: PROFILE (avatar + nick on top + LVL & XP caption + XP bar UNDER nick), PULSE, SURGE, ENERGY (new), KEYS, COG. All currency icons redrawn procedurally inline — no more PNG textures in the bar: PULSE = concentric hex coin with inner spokes, SURGE = 8-point sparkle star with particle dots, ENERGY = lightning bolt with electric-arc halo (visually distinct from PULSE hex coin), KEYS = octagonal head + shaft with notches + keyhole, COG = rotating 8-tooth gear. Bar still drives live energy regen and shows live PULSE / SURGE / ENERGY / KEYS / XP / LVL from Game state. Windows only.
